ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor in the company */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the contributor belongs */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the contributor joined the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username for the contributor */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager or team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the repository */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is archived */,
  "main_language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository to which the commit was made */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the commit */,
  "commit_sha" TEXT /* Unique SHA hash of the commit */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the commit was made */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request associated with the commit (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_details" (
  "commit_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit detail */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit to which the details pertain */,
  "insertions" INTEGER /* Number of insertions made in the commit */,
  "deletions" INTEGER /* Number of deletions made in the commit */,
  "percentage_of_changes" REAL /* Percentage of changes made by the commit relative to the total codebase */,
  "file_count" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  "code_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the code changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_details_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_files" (
  "commit_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit to which the file changes pertain */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the file (e.g., modified, added, deleted) */,
  "file_size_before" INTEGER /* Size of the file before the change (in bytes) */,
  "file_size_after" INTEGER /* Size of the file after the change (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main repository associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributions" (
  "project_contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the contribution was made */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "commit_count" INTEGER /* Total number of commits made to the project */,
  "insertion_count" INTEGER /* Total number of insertions made to the project */,
  "deletion_count" INTEGER /* Total number of deletions made to the project */,
  "last_contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contribution to the project */,
  "contribution_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the contributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository to which the access control applies */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that is allowed or denied access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the access control rule was last modified */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last modified the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the task belongs */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor to whom the task is assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task to which the comment pertains */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository to which the pull request pertains */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who created the pull request */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor to whom the pull request is assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was created */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was merged (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)
